ogTitle: Moonan Flat vs Moonbi: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonan Flat and Moonbi.
heading: Moonan Flat vs Moonbi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonan Flat, New South Wales and Moonbi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonbi has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Moonan Flat (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonan Flat or Moonbi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonan Flat has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Moonbi scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonan Flat scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Moonbi scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonan Flat or Moonbi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonbi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
